---
title: "CY350 Lab 5 Website"
subtitle: "A simple Quarto site for Computer Networks"
date: "April 21, 2026"
---

## Overview

This website was created with Quarto for In-Class Lab 5. The goal of the lab is to build a simple website, render it locally, publish it online, and share the published URL with the instructor.

::: {.callout-note}
This site is intentionally small: it demonstrates a home page, navigation, custom styling, and static HTML output that can be published with GitHub Pages or Netlify.
:::

## Network Concepts

| Layer | Example | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|
| Application | HTTP, DNS | Defines the services users interact with |
| Transport | TCP, UDP | Moves application data between hosts |
| Network | IP, ICMP | Routes packets across networks |
| Link | Ethernet, Wi-Fi | Handles local network delivery |

## Lab Checklist

- Created a Quarto website project.
- Added custom content for CY350.
- Rendered the site into static HTML.
- Prepared the site for publishing.

## Next Step

After publishing, submit the public website URL for credit.
